treeview.fallbackMessage: TreeView component not available. Manual input only.

help.title: ioBroker State Getter
help.stateDescription: The ioBroker state ID. If empty, msg.topic is used as the state ID.
help.outputPropertyDescription: The message property to store the value (default: payload).
help.manualInput: Manual input: Type the state ID directly
help.treeBrowser: Tree browser: Virtual scrolling tree view for large datasets
help.intelligentSearch: Intelligent search: Pre-indexed search for instant results
help.valueStored: The value is stored in msg.[outputProperty] (default: msg.payload)
help.completeState: The complete state object is available in msg.state
help.timestampIncluded: Timestamp information is included in the state object
